name: Old-Fashioned Egg Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise, lemon juice, dried minced onion, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir in the chopped hard-boiled eggs and celery until well mixed.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. For each serving, spoon about half a cup of the egg salad onto a lettuce leaf or spread it on bread.
Serves: 3 to 4
